suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-07-22. NVD identifies org.apache.httpcomponents.core5:httpcore5 through 5.4.2 as affected. Dependency-Check incorrectly maps the separate legacy org.apache.httpcomponents:httpcore 4.4.16 artifact to the HttpCore 5 CPE. Re-review this narrowly scoped suppression before it expires. https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54399 https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54428
